title: Changes have been made in the Decree on Export Supports (No. 5973)
bodyHtml:
Changes have been made in the Decree on Export Supports (No. 5973).

Under the Green Reconciliation Compliance Project, consultancy service expenses incurred by companies will be supported at a rate of 50 percent for 5 years, up to a total of 10,000,000 TL.

For companies included in the support scope of multi-channel chain stores, expenses related to international brand registration/renewal/protection, market research, reporting, rent, promotion, basic setup/concept architectural work/decoration for franchises/units will be supported at a rate of 50 percent for a period of 5 years, up to an annual limit of 180,000,000 TL.
